# People's Patterns — Full Reference

> Made-to-measure sewing patterns, generated in the browser from your body measurements.

Website: https://peoplespatterns.com
Email: hello@peoplespatterns.com
Instagram: @peoplespatterns
TikTok: @peoplespatternsofficial
YouTube: @peoplespatterns
Pinterest: @peoplespatterns
Etsy: etsy.com/shop/PeoplesPatterns

---

## What It Is

People's Patterns is a web application that generates custom-fit sewing patterns using parametric drafting. The same math taught in fashion design schools, applied to your exact body measurements instead of statistical size charts.

Every pattern is generated fresh from your measurements. There is nothing to grade up, grade down, or alter. The result is a print-ready PDF you cut out and sew.

---

## How It Works

1. Create a free account. No credit card required.
2. Enter your body measurements (waist, hip, chest/bust, shoulder, neck, rise, inseam, sleeve length, bicep, wrist, torso length).
3. Browse the catalog and select a garment.
4. Customize fit and style options (ease/fit, length, pocket style, collar, closure, etc.).
5. Preview the drafted pattern pieces in your browser.
6. Purchase and download a print-ready tiled PDF.

Pattern generation takes under one minute. The full process from measurements to download typically takes 5 to 10 minutes.

---

## What Is Included in Every Download

- Tiled PDF formatted for US Letter (8.5 x 11 in) home printing
- Tiled PDF formatted for A4 international home printing
- A0 single-sheet file for copy shop printing (FedEx Office, Staples, etc.)
- Scale verification page with a 2 x 2 inch test square
- Seam allowances included on all edges (selectable per download)
- Labeled grain lines, notches, and fold lines
- Complete construction instructions

---

## Pricing

### Single Patterns
- Simple: $9 — beginner-friendly garments. Elastic waists, minimal shaping, knit-friendly constructions.
- Core: $14 — wardrobe staples. Standard closures, waistbands, moderate shaping.
- Tailored: $19 — detailed construction. Pleats, darts, structured linings, set-in sleeves.

### Bundles
- 3-Pattern Capsule: $29
- 5-Pattern Wardrobe: $49

### Memberships
- Club: $12/month — 1 pattern credit per month
- Wardrobe: $24/month — 3 pattern credits per month

### Free
- First pattern is free with a free account. No credit card required.
- Unlimited re-downloads of purchased patterns at no extra charge.
- Re-generate with updated measurements at no extra charge.

---

---

## Style Options

Every garment has style options you configure before generating. Common options:

- **Ease / Fit**: slim, regular, relaxed, wide (controls how much ease is added to measurements)
- **Seam allowance**: 1/2 inch or 5/8 inch, included in pattern
- **Hem allowance**: 1 inch, 1.5 inch, or 2 inch
- **Rise style** (pants/shorts): ultra-low, low, mid, high, ultra-high
- **Sleeve length** (tops): short, three-quarter, long (or exact length in inches)
- **Neckline** (tops): crew, V-neck, scoop (varies by garment)
- **Pocket style**: no pockets, side seam, patch, cargo, welt (varies by garment)
- **Closure**: buttons, zipper, elastic, drawstring (varies by garment)
- **Length**: custom or preset (short, midi, maxi) for skirts and dresses

---

## Measurements Guide

All measurements are in inches. The pattern engine adds ease on top of your measurements.

| Measurement | Where to Measure |
|---|---|
| chest / bust | Fullest part of the chest or bust, tape parallel to floor |
| waist | Natural waist, narrowest point of the torso |
| hip | Fullest part of the hips, typically 7 to 9 inches below the waist |
| shoulder | Across the back from shoulder point to shoulder point |
| neck | Around the base of the neck where a collar would sit |
| rise | Sitting on a hard chair, measure from waist down the side seam to the seat |
| thigh | Around the fullest part of one thigh |
| inseam | From the crotch to the bottom of the ankle |
| torso length | From the highest shoulder point to the natural waist |
| sleeve length | From the shoulder point to the wrist bone |
| bicep | Around the fullest part of the upper arm |
| wrist | Around the wrist bone |
| waist to armpit | From the natural waist up to the armpit crease |
| skirt length | From the natural waist to desired hem |

Aim for accuracy within 1/4 inch. The engine adds ease; small differences are absorbed.

---

## FAQ

**Is my first pattern really free?**
Yes. Create a free account, enter your measurements, select any garment, and download your first pattern at no charge. No credit card is required.

**Can I re-download my patterns?**
Yes. Every purchased pattern is stored in your account with unlimited re-downloads, forever. No time limit and no extra charge.

**Can I regenerate with new measurements?**
Yes. If your measurements change, update your profile and regenerate any previously purchased pattern at no charge.

**Do I need pattern-making experience?**
No. The system handles all drafting math. You enter measurements, choose a garment, and receive a ready-to-cut pattern with construction instructions.

**Can I sew for other people?**
Yes. You can save multiple measurement profiles in your account, one for each person you sew for.

**What printer do I need?**
Any standard inkjet or laser printer that prints on US Letter or A4 paper.

**How do I verify my pattern printed correctly?**
Every PDF includes a scale verification page with a 2 x 2 inch test square. Measure it before printing the rest.

**Can I use a copy shop instead of printing at home?**
Yes. Every download includes an A0 single-sheet file for large-format printing at FedEx Office, Staples, or any print center.

**Do I still need to make alterations?**
In most cases, no. Because the pattern is drafted from your exact measurements, common alterations are already accounted for. A muslin test garment is still recommended before cutting your good fabric.

**Does it work for plus-size or petite bodies?**
Yes. The pattern works for any size or proportion because it drafts from your individual measurements, not a size chart.

**Is there a mobile app?**
No. People's Patterns runs in your web browser. No download or installation required.

**Can I use these patterns commercially?**
Personal use is included with every purchase. Contact hello@peoplespatterns.com for commercial licensing.

---

---

## Technical Notes

- Runs entirely in the browser. No software to download or install.
- Patterns generate client-side using parametric drafting math.
- All measurements in inches internally; UI supports inches or centimeters.
- Seam allowances computed per edge by the engine and added to the PDF download.
- Tiled PDFs include alignment marks, page numbers, and assembly instructions.
- A0 single-sheet format included in every download for copy shop printing.
